metadata.description: All-in-one agent harness for Claude Code — 200+ agents, 200+ skills, rules, 10 hooks (7 events), 3 MCP servers. Links via submodules from agency-agents, everything-claude-code, oh-my-claudecode, gstack, and superpowers.

plugins.name: my-claude
plugins.description: 200+ agents (core always loaded + domain agent-packs on demand), 200+ skills, rules, 10 behavioral hooks (vault enforcement, agent logging, verification), and MCP servers (Context7, Exa, grep.app)
